title: Laugh And Lie Down.
content:
Y'ave laughed enough, sweet, vary now your text!
    And laugh no more; or laugh, and lie down next.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Laugh And Lie Down."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
